coastal-highway.name: Coastal Highway
coastal-highway.desc: A weather-battered coastline wrapped around a frozen bay, Coastal Highway is an intermediate region with strong shelter coverage, abundant early loot, fishing access, and coastal beachcombing. Its advantages are offset by thin ice in parts of the bay and heavy predator pressure, especially around the townsite, Log Sort, and Misanthrope's Homestead.

stats.label: Connects To
stats.value: Mystery Lake / Bleak Inlet / Pleasant Valley / Desolation Point

mystery-lake.name: Mystery Lake
mystery-lake.desc: A balanced inland region centered on its namesake lake, with cabins, rail lines, fishing, and relatively forgiving navigation for new players.

stats.label: Connects To
stats.value: Mountain Town / Forlorn Muskeg / Pleasant Valley

ravine.name: Ravine
ravine.desc: A narrow transition region dominated by a deep ravine, rail bridge crossing, sparse resources, and low shelter coverage.

stats.label: Connects To
stats.value: Mystery Lake / Coastal Highway / Bleak Inlet

pleasant-valley.name: Pleasant Valley
pleasant-valley.desc: A large agricultural basin known for long sightlines, punishing blizzards, scattered farmsteads, and wide travel distances between shelters.

stats.label: Connects To
stats.value: Coastal Highway / Mystery Lake / Timberwolf Mountain / Blackrock

desolation-point.name: Desolation Point
desolation-point.desc: A compact industrial peninsula with a forge, lighthouse, shipwreck loot, and frequent predator pressure along narrow travel routes.

crumbling-highway.name: Crumbling Highway
crumbling-highway.desc: A collapsed coastal transition zone with mine tunnels, broken roadways, and limited shelter connecting Coastal Highway to Desolation Point.

timberwolf-mountain.name: Timberwolf Mountain
timberwolf-mountain.desc: A steep alpine region built around rope climbs, exposed travel, and the summit’s high-value cargo loot.

forlorn-muskeg.name: Forlorn Muskeg
forlorn-muskeg.desc: A bleak marshland of thin ice, rail lines, and sparse shelter that rewards route knowledge and caution.

stats.label: Connects To
stats.value: Mystery Lake / Broken Railroad / Mountain Town

broken-railroad.name: Broken Railroad
broken-railroad.desc: A narrow end-of-line region with strong shelter options, industrial loot, and dangerous wildlife concentrated around chokepoints.

stats.label: Connects To
stats.value: Forlorn Muskeg / Far Range Branch Line

mountain-town.name: Mountain Town
mountain-town.desc: A beginner-friendly region built around the town of Milton, with dense shelter, good early loot, and surrounding cliffs and basins.

stats.label: Connects To
stats.value: Mystery Lake / Forlorn Muskeg / Hushed River Valley

hushed-river-valley.name: Hushed River Valley
hushed-river-valley.desc: A remote wilderness region with no conventional indoor shelter, vertical navigation, rich resources, and strong survival demands.

bleak-inlet.name: Bleak Inlet
bleak-inlet.desc: A storm-lashed coastal-industrial region featuring timberwolves, dangerous traversals, and access to ammunition crafting infrastructure.

ash-canyon.name: Ash Canyon
ash-canyon.desc: A severe canyonland of rope climbs, narrow ledges, and high-value unique rewards hidden in difficult terrain.

blackrock.name: Blackrock
blackrock.desc: A mountainous prison region mixing industrial structures, severe weather, timberwolves, and long, hazardous routes.

transfer-pass.name: Transfer Pass
transfer-pass.desc: A rail transfer hub that serves as the main gateway into the Far Territory expansion regions.

stats.label: Connects To
stats.value: Forsaken Airfield / Zone of Contamination / Sundered Pass

forsaken-airfield.name: Forsaken Airfield
forsaken-airfield.desc: A vast, exposed airfield region with bitter cold, heavy travel distances, and sparse but valuable infrastructure.

zone-of-contamination.name: Zone of Contamination
zone-of-contamination.desc: A poisoned industrial mining region defined by toxic gas hazards, mine structures, and severe environmental risk.

sundered-pass.name: Sundered Pass
sundered-pass.desc: A high-altitude mountain pass with avalanches, extreme cold, and exposed routes linking the Far Territory regions.

stats.label: Connects To
stats.value: Transfer Pass / Forsaken Airfield / Zone of Contamination
